perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with pinkish-blonde hair and glasses peeks from behind a door labeled 'Mock Exam' in Chinese. (2) She enters the room dressed as a teacher, wearing a white jacket and a headset, holding a cup and papers. (3) She gestures with a pointer and adjusts her glasses while looking intensely at the camera. (4) She holds up a yellow study guide titled 'Ching Yuan'. (5) She hits the hand of an off-screen student with a pink pointer; digital fire effects appear on screen. (6) She erases and writes frantically on a whiteboard, then turns to point at the camera as the scene transitions to a blurred background with heart graphics.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music begins. (2) A female voice speaks in a loud, assertive, and slightly naggy tone, mimicking typical classroom instructions. (3) Sharp 'slap' and 'swish' sound effects accompany physical gestures. (4) The music remains constant but the vocal delivery changes speed to emphasize different catchphrases. (5) In the final phase, the music continues as the vocal asks a direct question to the audience.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'Those school days, teachers' catchphrases' - Hook text in white. (2) 'Catchphrase 1: Every class is the worst class' - Decorative title. (3) 'Catchphrase 2: First row students, your eardrums are about to burst' - Functional description. (4) 'Catchphrase 3: Teacher hitting you means teacher loves you' - Decorative title with emotional irony. (5) 'Catchphrase 4: The lesson that never ends' - Topic header. (6) 'What catchphrases did your teachers say?' - Engaging question in soft pink bubbles.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Catchphrase 1 -> Catchphrase 2 -> Catchphrase 3 -> Catchphrase 4 -> Outro/Engagement

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 hand appearing from off-screen representing a student.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with short blonde-pink hair, wearing round glasses, a white utility jacket, and a headset microphone to portray a teacher.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A room with a whiteboard, a door with exam signs, shelves filled with plush toys and collectibles, and various posters on the wall.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience by satirizing the stereotypical behavior and repetitive catchphrases of school teachers in Taiwan, creating a sense of shared nostalgia and humor.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator prominently features a study guide/booklet labeled '晴元' (Ching Yuan) during several segments of the skit.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-pitched teacher persona, rapid-fire catchphrase delivery, use of anime-style editing effects.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets a student or young adult demographic familiar with the specific cultural nuances of the Taiwanese education system.
